Music, at its best, always tells a story. Whether it’s a romantic classic from the 1800s or the latest Top 40 hit, the songs that last are those that connect with listeners via their universal stories. For the past twenty years, recording artist Abel Okugawa has been doing just that, creating his own unique blend of electronic music that fuses urban flavors together with natural, organic elements to tell his own musical story, using the hidden intricacies of sound and rhythm to bring life to each and every one of his projects.

I am a self taught artist with a focus on traditional pencil and paper. I am transitioning to learning how to make art on a digital art pad and I know my art will change over the next year as I learn new skills. Some sketches will turn into creature designs and potentially make it into Phobos 

    I am designing a corporative table top game based on my own ideas and designs. The focus is players that have never played a pen and paper table top role playing game (dungeons and dragons).

 HJTP aims to serve as an introduction to table top elements, such as roleplaying through pantomi or charades how their character react to being affected by fears and phobias. At the end of a play session successful players will have up to 6 basic items that could fit into most game worlds without breaking the immersion. Ideally 4 players will finish a 1 hour sessions and then be able to start a traditional campaign with a shared origin story for the group along with some starting items. Players could also choose to stay and continue escorting souls through Phobos until a God of Fear appears and opens another portal. Choosing to stay means the cards stay where they are and quest progression on all 8 chosen storylines do not reset, this is sometimes referred to as Roguelite gameplay.

Name: BlockTempo
Description:
​​​BlockTempo 是華語區塊鏈最有影響力的全方位媒體，2023 年 12 月時，成立台灣首個結合「Web 3 新創企業加速器 × 共享辦公空間」的創新品牌 TempoX，成立至今短短三個月內，已成功舉辦一系列精采活動，如：以太坊創辦人 Vitalik 和 激進市場作者 Glen Weyl 親自來台參與的 Plurality 研討會，聚集多位知名政經學界人士；同時，也為背靠月活用戶超過 9 億人的通訊軟體 Telegram 的 公鏈 TON 舉辦多場台北線下社群聚會...等，以凝聚台灣的區塊鏈社群能量。

BlockTempo is the most influential media platform for blockchain in the Chinese-speaking world. We launched Taiwan's first innovative brand combining a "Web 3 Startup Accelerator × Co-working Space" called TempoX in December 2023. In just three months since its establishment, TempoX has successfully hosted a series of exciting events. These include Plurality Summit attended by Ethereum founder Vitalik and Radical Markets author Glen Weyl, which gathered many prominent figures from the political, economic, and academic sectors. Additionally, we organized several offline community meetups in Taipei for the TON blockchain, which has over 900 million monthly active users, aiming to unite Taiwan's blockchain community.

Benefits: Do you want to benefit from the beauty of the photography world?
Description:
I am Feyzullah, a passionate photographer with a unique perspective on capturing the beauty of the world through my lens. With a camera in my hand and a heart full of creativity, I devoted 12 years to the art of photography.

My photography adventure started at a young age when I was given my first camera as a gift. Thanks to the viewfinder, I discovered the magic of freezing moments in time and turning them into eternal memories.

Over the years I have honed my skills in various types of photography, from documentary and life to portrait and travel photography. My works are generally from life; for example, it focuses on the play of light and shadow, the essence of human emotions, or the wonders of the natural world.

As a photographer, I believe in the power of telling stories through images. Each photograph tells a unique narrative, and I aim to capture the essence and emotions of every scene I encounter. My goal is to transport the audience to the moment they press the shutter and make them experience the emotions I feel behind the camera.

My work has appeared in The Times, Daily Mail and The Telegraphy, and while I hold the Fiap designation Efiap and the GPU designation GPU Crown2, I continue to seek out new opportunities to collaborate with others who share my passion for visual storytelling.

Thank you for joining me on this photography journey. I look forward to sharing more of my perspective through the art of photography and creating visual stories that resonate with you.

Description:
Crack is a graffiti artist, toy designer & digital artist based in Jakarta,
Indonesia. Art has always been a part of Crack life.
In Junior High, he saw some kids making graffiti tags of their school.
Curious, he started spending his lunch money on spray paint and
began to graffiti tags all around the neighborhood.
Realizing his passion for graffiti & illustration, Crack pursued an
education in art, majoring in Visual Communication Design.

Having been doing art for more than 10 years, Crack work has
taken him to new places, working with various mediums & collabo-
rating with many brands and is currently working on adapting his art
to designer toys, most notably a spray can character that he been
developing for awhile now.

Hatred of the society he lives in and the way that society thinks is
what drives Crack to make his art. He is inspired by things in his
daily life & by a lot of his childhood memories. 
When creating animations, motion graphics and designer toys,
Crack likes to include elements of graffiti, Hip Hop & Japanese
culture in his pieces.

Crack artwork is defined by crisp lines, with resplendent, vibrant &
urban, with a sense of flow, I consider my work to be my way of self-discovery. I constantly work
to refine my style by attempting various approaches to achieve my
goals.

Description:
A grain of sand in a sea of glass.

My name is Alina Simona, a multidisciplinary artist known by the pseudonym Anymatnft, constantly searching for beauty and ways to expose it to viewers. I was born on the shores of the Black Sea, in Romania.

I made my debut in the digital art scene through collages, trying to evoke through my works feelings that are easily recognizable, but difficult to convey in words (memories, dreams). My passion for digital art developed, and I discovered AI technology. So I explored this branch, integrating it delicately into my subsequent collections, managing to diversify my portfolio and evolve significantly in this new journey, still full of unknowns.

Always wanting to step out of my comfort zone, I learned to explore different programs to beautify my art, realizing that even in this field there are no limits when you truly desire something. It took courage, patience, and perseverance to realize my dream with small but sure steps.

Your support means the world to me. I aim to share the beauty of everyday experiences and emotions through my art.

Thank you for being part of my journey!

Description:
This is TechTrend Labs’ premium execution track—designed for serious retail investors who want more than noise and hype.

We focus on select, research-backed model portfolios designed for long-term asymmetric outcomes. These are structured, real-money portfolios—not “degen” calls or influencer shills. Risk is managed, conviction is earned, and updates are grounded in data, not noise.

Updates are published monthly or quarterly, depending on market conditions. Each report includes performance tracking, rationale for adjustments, rotation logic, and macro commentary when relevant.

Our current spotlight is a 5-token altcoin portfolio, representing the alpha-seeking 50% of a larger crypto allocation (BTC holds the remaining 50%, not tracked here). This portfolio is live-tracked using our own dashboard and real-time alerts—monitoring sentiment, trend strength, and risk signals to stay ahead of major moves.

While this is not a short-term trade feed, we may occasionally include tactical exposure to high-reward opportunities if they fit our broader risk and conviction framework.

Premium Access: Subscription Details

Access to this premium portfolio requires a one-time minimum stake of ACS equivalent to $100 USD.

- The price will be adjusted periodically to reflect this target value as ACS fluctuates in price.
- You retain full control over your staked tokens. This is non-recurring and non-spending.
- Staking grants access to premium portfolio insights—and supports a strategy that includes ACS as a core holding.

Why ACS? Access Protocol isn't just the platform we publish on—it’s one of our highest-conviction bets in the altcoin portfolio. Staking here isn’t just a subscription; it’s a strategic signal that aligns you with the very assets we track.

Notes

-Portfolios are built for resilience, transparency, and long-term edge.
-Each update offers insights not just into what we hold—but why, how, and for how long.
-You’re not just “following” a portfolio—you’re seeing behind the scenes of how structured conviction plays are actually built.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Nothing here is financial advice. This is personal research and educational material only. Always consult your advisor before making any financial decision.
